name: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc.
business: OptimumBank Holdings, Inc. operates as a bank holding company for OptimumBank, which offers a variety of commercial banking services including real estate loans, business lending, and treasury management to individual and corporate customers in South Florida.

exposures.sentence: The company provides stabilized owner-occupied and non-owner-occupied loans, as well as accounts receivable-based asset-based-lending ( ABL ) lines of credit to skilled nursing facility clients.
The Bank has carved out a niche in the MCA industry to provide treasury management services, including servicing of high-volumn ACH transactions to organizations with various entities.
